item.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 30, 23:00 UTC  -  Jul 31, 04:00 UTC

Jul 8, 14:31 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our responsibilities for Mail filerz, we will be performing infrastructure maintenance.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 30/07/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 31/07/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Zimbra maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 20:00 - 22:00 UTC

Jul 7, 10:26 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Zimbra offer.

Start time : 08/07/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 22:00 UTC
Service impact : Zimbra mailbox will be temporarily inaccessible for 5 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our VoIP infrastructure for our Zimbra offer.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][VoIP] - Softcall maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 19:00 - 20:00 UTC

Jul 8, 09:03 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Softcall offer.

Start time : 08/07/2026 19:00 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 20:00 UTC
Service impact : Provisioning for the Softcall service will experience temporary disruptions during maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Softcall infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting/Databases] - CloudDB and Databases incident notification
item.description:
Jul 8, 09:35 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting / Databases offering has been resolved.

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
End time : 07/07/2026 01:25 UTC
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 21:50 UTC
Update - Service has been fully restored since 07/07/2026 01:25 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Public network experienced availability and latency issues.
Customers Impact : Customers experienced temporary service unavailability or increased latency when accessing their services.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

Jul 7, 18:33 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions: At 20:30 UTC, we will perform an upgrade on the affected network equipment to prevent this issue from recurring.

No customer impact is expected during this maintenance.

Our teams will closely monitor service stability throughout the operation and will remain mobilized until the maintenance has been successfully completed.

We will keep you informed of the progress and notify you once the maintenance has been completed.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 14:17 UTC
Update - Please find the details of this incident below :

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Public network experienced availability and latency issues.
Customers Impact : Customers experienced temporary service unavailability or increased latency when accessing their services.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our team isolated the affected network equipment to restore service.
The service has been restored since 07/07/2026 01:25 UTC.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are continuing to investigate the root cause of the incident while closely monitoring system stability to ensure continued stability.

We will keep you updated on the progress of our investigation.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 03:13 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 07/07/2026 02:42 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some CloudDB and Web Hosting Databases were temporarily unavailable on eu001, eu005, eu007, eu010 and eu012.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access and use their databases.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 02:45 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting / Databases offer on the specific GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some CloudDB and Web Hosting Databases are temporarily unavailable on eu001, eu005, eu007, eu010 and eu012.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their databases.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Multiple Clusters Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 8, 09:33 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
End time : 07/07/2026 01:25 UTC
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 21:52 UTC
Update - Service has been fully restored since 07/07/2026 01:25 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Public network experienced availability and latency issues.
Customers Impact : Customers experienced temporary service unavailability or increased latency when accessing their services.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

Jul 7, 18:34 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions: At 20:30 UTC, we will perform an upgrade on the affected network equipment to prevent this issue from recurring.

No customer impact is expected during this maintenance.

Our teams will closely monitor service stability throughout the operation and will remain mobilized until the maintenance has been successfully completed.

We will keep you informed of the progress and notify you once the maintenance has been completed.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 14:17 UTC
Update - Please find the details of this incident below :

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Public network experienced availability and latency issues.
Customers Impact : Customers experienced temporary service unavailability or increased latency when accessing their services.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our team isolated the affected network equipment to restore service.
The service has been restored since 07/07/2026 01:25 UTC.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are continuing to investigate the root cause of the incident while closely monitoring system stability to ensure continued stability.

We will keep you updated on the progress of our investigation.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 01:40 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 07/07/2026 01:25 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The following clusters were temporarily unavailable or experiencing latency: Cluster020, Cluster090, Cluster100, Cluster102, Cluster103, Cluster105, Cluster106, Cluster107, Cluster110, Cluster111, Cluster112, Cluster113, Cluster114, Cluster115, Cluster117, Cluster120, Cluster121, Cluster123, Cluster124, Cluster126, Cluster127, Cluster128, Cluster129, Cluster130, and Cluster131.
Customers Impact : Customers hosted on the specified clusters may have been unable to access their websites.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 6, 23:18 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue on the Cluster100 in GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 06/07/2026 20:08 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The following clusters are temporarily unavailable or experiencing latency : Cluster020, Cluster090, Cluster100, Cluster102, Cluster103, Cluster105, Cluster106, Cluster107, Cluster110, Cluster111, Cluster112, Cluster113, Cluster114, Cluster115, Cluster117, Cluster120, Cluster121, Cluster123, Cluster124, Cluster126, Cluster127, Cluster128, Cluster129, Cluster130, and Cluster131.
Customers Impact : Customers hosted on the specified clusters may currently be unable to access their websites.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MXPlan/Zimbra incident notification
item.description:
Jul 8, 09:06 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer on the specific GLOBAL region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 08/07/2026 07:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Migration form MXPlan to Zimbra is temporarily facing slowness.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to modify the accounts associated with their email addresses.
Customers will receive a mail when their migration is finished.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster120 - Filerz48 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 8, 08:01 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer on the specific Cluster120 - Filerz48.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 08/07/2026 07:28 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz48 is temporarily unavailable on Web Hosting Cluster120.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on Cluster120 - Filerz48.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz maintenance notification
item.description:
Jul 8, 02:01 UTC
Completed - All services are operational.

Jul 7, 23:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 1, 13:23 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our MX Plan Filerz.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 07/07/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz770 Cluster106 and Filerz551 Cluster111 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 7, 16:24 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 07/07/2026 15:30 UTC
End time : 07/07/2026 16:22 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 15:46 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering on Filerz770 Cluster106 and Filerz551 Cluster111.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 07/07/2026 15:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Filerz770 Cluster106 and Filerz551 Cluster111 are unreachable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on the specified Filerz.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [FR][VoIP] - Softcall incident notification
item.description:
Jul 7, 16:05 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Softcall offering has been resolved.

Start time : 07/07/2026 01:00 UTC
End time : 07/07/2026 07:10 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Softcall was temporarily facing perturbations.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to save their SIP lines on Softcall.
Also, customers have faced perturbations on their incoming and outgoing calls.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 07:33 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 07/07/2026 07:10 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 07/07/2026 01:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Softcall was temporarily facing perturbations.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to save their SIP lines on Softcall.
Also, customers have faced perturbations on their incoming and outgoing calls.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 07:25 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our VoIP offering, which is causing temporary issue in the FR region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 07/07/2026 01:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Softcall is temporarily facing perturbations.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to save their SIP lines on Softcall.
Also, customers can face perturbations on their incoming and outgoing calls.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MXPlan/Zimbra incident notification
item.description:
Jul 7, 15:29 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 07/07/2026 08:59 UTC
End time : 07/07/2026 15:25 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 7, 09:14 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer on the specific GLOBAL region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 07/07/2026 08:59 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Migration form MXPlan to Zimbra is temporarily facing slowness.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to modify the accounts associated with their email addresses.
Customers will receive a mail when their migration is finished.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Domains] - Domains Name incident notification on .KI
item.description:
Jul 7, 09:21 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our .KI Domains offer, customers in the impacted zone are unable to perform some tasks on .KI domains.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 07/07/2026 09:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .KI domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform specified operations on .KI domains.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 6, 23:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 1, 13:20 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our MX Plan Filerz.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

End time : 07/07/2026 04:00 UTC

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Server1012 Cluster130 incident notification
item.description:
Jul 7, 01:11 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 06/07/2026 07:13 UTC
End time : 06/07/2026 20:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by https://bare-metal-servers.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/rj77g0tslfw0

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 6, 13:55 UTC
Update - Please find below an update on the situation :

Impacted Service(s) : Server1012 is unreachable on Web Hosting Cluster130.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by https://bare-metal-servers.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/rj77g0tslfw0
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 6, 09:38 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions : Our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 6, 07:29 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering on the Server1012 Cluster130.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 06/07/2026 07:13 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Server1012 is unreachable on Web Hosting Cluster130.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on the specified server.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
